meanings.definition: something offered (as a proposal or bid)
examples: noteworthy new offerings for investors included several index funds

meanings.definition: money contributed to a religious organization

examples: a generous offer of assistance

meanings.definition: the act of contributing to the funds of a church or charity
examples: oblations for aid to the poor

meanings.definition: make available or accessible, provide or furnish
examples: The conference center offers a health spa
The hotel offers private meeting rooms
She offered us all a cold drink
She volunteered to drive the old lady home
I offered to help with the dishes but the hostess would not hear of it
He offered his opinion
extend my greetings
He offered his sympathy
The stores are offering specials on sweaters this week
The Swiss dealer offered $2 million for the painting

meanings.definition: produce or introduce on the stage
examples: The Shakespeare Company is offering `King Lear' this month

meanings.definition: present as an act of worship
examples: offer prayers to the gods
put up a good fight
offer resistance
extend a loan
The bank offers a good deal on new mortgages
he popped the question on Sunday night
she proposed marriage to the man she had known for only two months
The old bachelor finally declared himself to the young woman
I offered to leave the committee if they did not accept my proposal
